title: How to Generate Prospects with AI in GoHighLevel — Fast
description: Learn how to enable Prospect by AI in GoHighLevel and get 2-3 qualified leads weekly. Step-by-step guide with niche targeting, intelligent scoring & best practices.
html_content:
If you're running a digital marketing agency, you know the biggest bottleneck isn't closing deals—it's finding qualified prospects in the first place. Manual prospecting takes weeks. Cold calling lists are stale. And traditional lead sources? They're expensive and unreliable.

That's where Prospect by AI in GoHighLevel changes the game. This AI-powered feature automatically delivers 2-3 hand-picked, high-quality prospect recommendations every single week—based on your niche and location targeting. No manual digging. No wasted time. Just pre-qualified businesses ready to hear your pitch.

In this guide, I'll walk you through exactly how to enable, configure, and leverage Prospect by AI to fill your pipeline fast. And if you want to test-drive this yourself risk-free, start your free 30-day GoHighLevel trial here—that's double the standard 14-day trial.

📋 In This Guide

  • What is Prospect by AI and Why It Matters for Agencies
  • How Intelligent Scoring and Data Signals Work
  • Step-by-Step: Enabling Prospect by AI in GoHighLevel
  • Configuring Your Niche and Location Preferences
  • Basic Reports vs. Premium Reports: What's the Difference?
  • Maximizing Your Prospect Pipeline: Best Practices

What is Prospect by AI and Why It Matters for Agencies

Prospect by AI is GoHighLevel's proprietary AI system designed to automate lead discovery at scale. Instead of spending hours researching businesses on LinkedIn, searching directories, or buying outdated lead lists, you get curated recommendations delivered straight to your inbox.

Here's what makes it different:

  • Automated Weekly Delivery: Receive 2-3 prospects every week without lifting a finger.
  • Intelligent Matching: The AI analyzes thousands of signals to match businesses that fit your exact ideal client profile.
  • Location & Niche Precision: Filter by geographic area and industry—so you only get relevant leads.
  • Pre-Qualified Data: Each prospect comes with contact info, company size, and engagement signals.

For agencies managing multiple clients or juggling growth targets, this feature eliminates the tedious legwork and lets you focus on what you do best: closing deals and delivering results.

How Intelligent Scoring and Data Signals Work

Prospect by AI doesn't just randomly pick businesses. It uses machine learning to score and rank prospects based on dozens of data signals. Here's the anatomy of that system:

  • Business Profile Signals: Company size, revenue estimates, employee count, and industry classification.
  • Digital Footprint Signals: Website quality, online presence, social media activity, and content updates.
  • Engagement Signals: Recent job postings, funding announcements, leadership changes—indicators of growth and pain points.
  • Niche Fit Signals: Does the business match your service offering? Does it have the budget and need for what you sell?
  • Geographic Relevance: Local market conditions, competitor density, and regional demand.

The algorithm weighs all these factors to surface prospects with the highest likelihood of conversion. This means fewer unqualified leads and more time spent on actual opportunities.

💡 Pro Tip

The more accurate you are with your niche and location settings, the smarter the AI becomes. Start narrow, test, and refine based on which prospects close. The system learns from your feedback.

Step-by-Step: Enabling Prospect by AI in GoHighLevel

Step 1: Log into Your GoHighLevel Account

Navigate to your main dashboard. You'll need an active GoHighLevel account to access Prospect by AI. (If you don't have one yet, grab a free 30-day trial here.)

Step 2: Locate Prospect by AI

From your dashboard, look for the Prospect by AI menu item in the left sidebar. It's typically found under the "Leads" or "Automation" section, depending on your GHL version.

Step 3: Click "Enable Prospect by AI"

Once you locate the feature, click the activation button. You'll see a setup wizard that walks you through initial configuration. GoHighLevel will ask for basic information about your agency and ideal client profile.

Step 4: Agree to Terms and Verify Account Status

Confirm your account meets any tier requirements (this feature is typically available on Agency and higher plans). Once verified, you're ready to configure your preferences.

Configuring Your Niche and Location Preferences

This is where the magic happens. The more specific you are, the better your results.

Setting Your Primary Niche

Select your main target industry or service vertical. Examples: Plumbing, HVAC, Real Estate, E-Commerce, Digital Marketing Agencies, Dental Practices, etc. You can add multiple niches if you serve different verticals, but start with one to establish data.

Adding Location Filters

Choose your target geographic area—city, state, or region. This is critical for local service businesses. If you're a national agency, you can set multiple location zones and receive weekly prospects for each.

Refining Ideal Client Criteria

GoHighLevel allows you to layer additional filters:

  • Company size (number of employees)
  • Annual revenue range
  • Business age (startup vs. established)
  • Growth stage indicators

Example: If you specialize in helping HVAC companies scale their digital presence in the Midwest, you'd filter for HVAC businesses, 5-50 employees, in states like Ohio, Michigan, and Illinois. The AI will then hunt for companies matching that profile.

Basic Reports vs. Premium Reports: What's the Difference?

GoHighLevel offers two tiers of Prospect by AI reporting. Here's how they compare:

Basic Reports

  • 2-3 prospects delivered weekly
  • Contact name and phone number
  • Company information and website
  • Basic firmographics (size, industry, location)
  • No additional data enrichment

Premium Reports

  • All Basic Report data, plus:
  • Email addresses and direct contact info
  • Detailed company insights and growth signals
  • Decision-maker profiles and LinkedIn URLs
  • Recent business events (funding, hiring, website changes)
  • Engagement likelihood scoring
  • Custom lead scoring based on your criteria

Premium Reports cost more but save you hours on research. If your close rate justifies the investment, Premium is worth it. For agencies just starting out, Basic Reports are a solid way to test the system and build momentum.

Maximizing Your Prospect Pipeline: Best Practices

1. Act Fast on New Prospects

When you receive your weekly prospects, reach out within 24-48 hours. Fresh prospects respond better to cold outreach.

2. Create Outreach Templates

Build GoHighLevel automation workflows that send personalized emails to new prospects. Use the AI prospect data to customize your message for each industry and company size.

3. Track Results and Refine

Keep notes on which prospects convert and which don't. Use this feedback to adjust your niche, location, and company size filters. Over time, your targeting becomes laser-focused.

4. Combine with Lead Nurturing Sequences

Don't rely on a single email. Set up multi-step nurture sequences that automatically follow up with prospects who don't respond to the first touch. GoHighLevel's automation makes this effortless.

5. Segment Prospects by Report Type

If you're using both Basic and Premium reports, tag them differently in GoHighLevel. Premium prospects might warrant a more aggressive outreach cadence.

6. Use GoHighLevel's CRM to Track Every Interaction

Log all calls, emails, and notes within GoHighLevel. This creates a complete history and ensures no prospect falls through the cracks—even if you're managing a large team.

Key Takeaways

  • Prospect by AI automates lead discovery and delivers qualified recommendations weekly.
  • Intelligent scoring uses dozens of data signals to match your ideal client profile.
  • Enable the feature in three steps: navigate to Prospect by AI, click enable, and configure your preferences.
  • Niche and location filters are critical—the more specific, the better your results.
  • Premium Reports include email, decision-maker data, and engagement signals worth the investment for serious agencies.
  • Act fast, track results, and refine your targeting continuously for maximum ROI.

Prospect by AI is one of the fastest ways to build a consistent pipeline without the manual grunt work. Combined with GoHighLevel's automation, CRM, and funnel-building tools, you have everything needed to scale an agency from zero to six figures.
